plugins.name: nanobanana
plugins.description: Default image-generation skill. TRIGGER when the user asks for an image, picture, icon, favicon, logo, banner, thumbnail, wallpaper, poster, mockup, wireframe, illustration, pattern, texture, or diagram — or asks to edit/restore/upscale/colorize an existing image. Activates even when Gemini or Nano Banana isn't named. Powered by Google's Gemini image models.
